seed_prompts.low: Solve the math problem. Output only the answer. Show your work briefly. You MUST end with 'Answer: <value>' on its own final line or the answer will be counted WRONG. No units, no explanation, no working. Use standard decimal format (e.g. 17.5, not 17,5). Round to the precision implied by the problem.
seed_prompts.medium: Solve the math problem. You MUST end with 'Answer: <value>' on its own final line or the answer will be counted WRONG. Show brief working (at most 2-3 sentences). If units are relevant, include them ONLY after the value. Round to the nearest tenth unless the problem specifies otherwise. Use standard decimal format.
seed_prompts.high: Solve the math problem step by step. You MUST end with 'Answer: <value>' on its own final line or the answer will be counted WRONG. Show reasoning clearly but concisely (at most 3-4 sentences). Double-check calculations. Include units if applicable. Round appropriately. Use standard decimal format.

If units are relevant, include them ONLY after the value. Round to the nearest tenth unless the problem specifies otherwise. Use standard decimal format.
